data.title: Tesla Plans to Launch Larger Electric SUV in India Next Week
data.description: Tesla is gearing up to unveil a new, larger version of its globally popular electric SUV in India as early as next week. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the company's strategic move to expand its presence in the Indian market. This development comes as Tesla aims to tap into the growing demand for electric vehicles in the region. The introduction of the larger SUV model is expected to bolster Tesla's market share and cater to the preferences of Indian consumers seeking spacious and eco-friendly transportation options. The launch aligns with Tesla's broader strategy to increase its footprint in international markets, particularly in countries with emerging electric vehicle sectors. Further details about the model specifications and pricing are anticipated to be revealed during the official launch event.

data.title: Goldman Sachs Analyst Questions Sustainability of Recent U.S. Stock Rally
data.description: Goldman Sachs Asset Allocation Research Head, Mueller-Glissmann, has expressed skepticism about the sustainability of the recent rise in U.S. stocks. According to Jin10, he stated that the Federal Reserve would need to resume interest rate cuts to maintain the current momentum. He described the recent stock market rebound as a 'rapid and vigorous recovery phase,' driven partly by technical factors, including hedge funds that previously sold stocks to reduce risk now being forced to rebuild positions. Despite the S&P 500 potentially rising over 3% for three consecutive weeks, he questioned whether the rally could continue without monetary policy support. He noted that while the stock market is performing well, oil prices remain high, and the credit market lags. The strong performance of the stock market is partly attributed to high exposure to technology stocks.

data.title: Citadel Securities Explores Liquidity Provision for Prediction Markets Beyond Sports
data.description:
Citadel Securities President Jim Esposito has indicated that the firm is considering providing liquidity for prediction markets beyond the sports sector. According to NS3.AI, the prediction market industry generated approximately $51 billion in volume during 2025. Esposito highlighted that institutional clients could leverage event contracts to hedge risks, citing the upcoming U.S. midterm elections in November as a potential example.

Bernstein reported that platforms like Kalshi and Polymarket have already executed a combined $60 billion in volume this year. Meanwhile, the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) is working on drafting regulations for the expanding industry.

data.description: 1. Arthur Hayes: Expects a surge in Hyperliquid trading volume, bullish on HYPE to rise above $150; 2. Mitsubishi UFJ: Gold futures are expected to achieve a weekly gain.

data.title: Telegram Founder Criticizes EU's Age Verification App Design
data.description:
Telegram founder Pavel Durov has raised concerns over the European Union's newly launched 'Age Verification App,' questioning its design intentions. According to PANews, Durov expressed skepticism on his personal channel, noting that the app was hacked within just two minutes of its release. He suggested that such a basic vulnerability might be a deliberate move by EU bureaucrats: initially releasing a tool claimed to be 'privacy-friendly' but easily compromised, only to later remove privacy protections under the guise of 'enhancing security.' This, he argues, could ultimately transform the app into a surveillance tool targeting social media users across Europe.

Durov urged users to remain vigilant, suggesting that the current 'accidental breach' might merely serve as an excuse for the EU to shift from privacy protection to comprehensive scrutiny. He warned that such measures could evolve into a monitoring tool for all users.

data.title: Ebury Strategist Warns of Potential Pound Decline Amid Political Uncertainty
data.description: Ebury strategist Matthew Ryan has indicated that the British pound could face downward pressure if the ruling Labour Party performs poorly in the upcoming local elections in May. According to Jin10, Ryan noted that such an outcome would increase pressure on UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer's position. If the market anticipates that a potential successor might lead to higher spending and debt, the pound could be further impacted. Recent media reports have raised questions about Starmer's future, following former U.S. Ambassador Peter Mandelson's approval for a position despite failing a security review. Ryan mentioned that betting markets now consider the possibility of Starmer stepping down by the end of June as a realistic scenario.

data.title: Perpetual DEX Market Experiences Decline in Trading Volume
data.description:
On April 17, data from DefiLlama indicates a general decline in trading volume across the on-chain Perpetual Decentralized Exchange (DEX) market. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, Hyperliquid's trading volume decreased by approximately 16% compared to the previous day. TradeXYZ's weekly trading volume has dropped to levels seen in early March, while Aster currently ranks second in trading volume.

The current rankings for major Perpetual DEX trading volumes are as follows:

Hyperliquid reports a 24-hour trading volume of approximately $6.52 billion, with open contract volumes reaching $7.58 billion.

TradeXYZ has a 24-hour trading volume of around $1.6 billion, with open contract volumes at $1.79 billion.

Aster's 24-hour trading volume is approximately $2.08 billion, with open contract volumes at $2.09 billion.

EdgeX shows a 24-hour trading volume of about $2.04 billion, with open contract volumes at $948 million.

Lighter's 24-hour trading volume is approximately $1.59 billion, with open contract volumes at $694 million.

Pacifica has a 24-hour trading volume of around $482 million, with open contract volumes at $81.53 million.

data.title: A trader held ASTEROID for 580 days and made a profit of $370,000, during which time the position was once reduced to zero.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, trader "0x9810" spent 9.1 ETH (US$21,600) to buy 802 million ASTEROID in September 2024. Holding the tokens for over 580 days, their position was once close to zero. Today, the market capitalization of ASTEROID on the Ethereum chain has exceeded US$20 million, resulting in a profit of US$370,000 from the 802 million ASTEROID (US$392,000).

data.title: Kentucky House Primary: A Test for Republican Opposition to Trump
data.description: Republicans in Congress are closely monitoring a House primary in Kentucky, which could determine their ability to oppose U.S. President Donald Trump on various issues. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the significance of this primary as a potential indicator of the party's stance towards Trump. The outcome may reveal whether Republican lawmakers can challenge the President's policies or continue aligning with his agenda. This primary is seen as a crucial moment for the GOP, as it may influence their political strategy and relationship with Trump moving forward.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Seeks Resolution in Iran Conflict
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump is reportedly eager to bring an end to the ongoing conflict with Iran, according to a senior Gulf official familiar with the discussions. According to NS3.AI, Trump may be open to making additional compromises to achieve this goal. However, the official noted that Iran has yet to propose terms that would allow Trump to conclude the conflict while maintaining his reputation.

data.title: Global Leaders Turn to China Amid Rising Tensions
data.description: Chinese leader Xi Jinping has stated that "the international order is crumbling into disarray." Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the aftermath of unsuccessful peace talks between the U.S. and Iran, which has prompted world leaders to seek dialogue with Xi. This development underscores the increasing anticipation for China to emerge as a significant force for peace on the global stage. As tensions rise, the international community is looking towards China for potential solutions and stability.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 630 USDT with a 1.59% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 17, 2026, 10:49 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 630 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 630.01001 USDT, with a narrowed 1.59% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Solana and Chainlink ETFs Experience Significant Inflows
data.description: Spot Solana ETFs attracted $15.5 million on April 16, marking their largest daily inflow since March 17. According to NS3.AI, Chainlink ETFs also saw a notable increase, with $1.57 million added, the highest daily inflow since March 19. The cumulative net inflows for Solana ETFs have reached $996.82 million. Meanwhile, Chainlink ETFs have maintained a six-day streak of positive flows, with no daily net outflows recorded.

data.title: Vietnam and Singapore Firms Collaborate on Blockchain Infrastructure
data.description:
Vietnam's HHP Digital Asset High-Tech Center has partnered with Singapore's Embed Financial Group Holdings (EFGH) to establish a joint venture named VNL1. According to Foresight News, the collaboration aims to develop a national blockchain-based product traceability infrastructure in Vietnam. The two companies have invested approximately $8 million into VNL1, which will operate as an Ethereum Layer 2 settlement layer to support Vietnam's regulations on product identification, verification, and traceability.

Additionally, the partnership includes a framework agreement for five digital projects. These projects encompass the V-Fintech financial technology platform, the V-TOK tourism self-service kiosk, the V-ICEX commodity pricing infrastructure, the GDCAI AI computing center, and the V-FIT financial complex project in Ho Chi Minh City.

data.title: Hyperliquid Achieves Revenue Milestone Amidst Market Dynamics
data.description: On April 17, Hyperliquid reported a revenue of $3.27 million, marking its highest since February 7, according to BlockBeats. This achievement places Hyperliquid behind Tether, which earned $16.41 million, and Circle, with $6.77 million in revenue, based on data from DefiLlama.

data.title: Crypto-Linked U.S. Stocks Rise in Pre-Market Trading
data.description: Crypto-linked U.S. stocks experienced gains in pre-market trading. According to NS3.AI, Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) saw an increase of 1.56%. Other stocks such as COIN, SBET, and HOOD also traded higher, reflecting positive sentiment in the market.

data.title: Bitcoin RHODL Ratio Reaches Third-Highest Level, Suggesting Market Bottom
data.description: Glassnode's Bitcoin RHODL Ratio has climbed to 4.5, marking the third-highest level recorded. According to NS3.AI, this indicator is currently more indicative of a market bottom rather than a cycle peak. The RHODL Ratio measures the amount of Bitcoin held by long-term holders compared to short-term holders. Historically, higher readings were observed only in 2015 and 2022.

data.title: Latin America Seeks Opportunity Amid US-Iran Conflict
data.description: The ongoing conflict between the United States and Iran presents Latin America with a unique opportunity to establish itself as a reliable supplier of energy resources. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the region's potential to leverage its stability and abundant energy reserves to meet global demands. As tensions escalate in the Middle East, Latin American countries could capitalize on their relative peace and resource wealth to strengthen their position in the global energy market. This strategic move could enhance their economic influence and provide a stable alternative to regions affected by geopolitical unrest.

data.title: Tokenization's Impact on Asset Liquidity Debated at Paris Blockchain Week
data.description:
Industry leaders at Paris Blockchain Week have challenged the notion that tokenization inherently enhances the liquidity of traditionally hard-to-trade assets. According to Cointelegraph, executives argued that simply placing private credit, real estate, or other illiquid products on the blockchain does not automatically create active secondary markets.

During a panel discussion moderated by Cointelegraph CEO Yana Prikhodchenko, Oya Celiktemur, Ondo Finance's sales director for Europe, the Middle East, and Africa, highlighted a common misconception regarding tokenization. Celiktemur stated, "I think there’s still this idea that tokenizing something illiquid will somehow magically make it a liquid asset, which is just not true." She emphasized that assets like real estate and private credit have historically lacked liquidity.

Francesco Ranieri Fabracci, head of tokenization expansion at Tether, echoed this sentiment, noting that not all assets become liquid simply by being placed on the blockchain. Fabracci argued that only specific instruments, such as bonds, money market funds, and stablecoins, are likely to achieve consistent liquidity in tokenized markets.

The conversation comes amid the ongoing expansion of the tokenized real-world asset (RWA) sector, which is shifting focus from issuance growth to whether these tokenized products can achieve significant activity beyond limited distribution channels. Data from RWA analytics platform RWA.xyz indicates that the tokenized RWA market grew from $8.8 billion on April 16, 2025, to approximately $29.9 billion by April 16, 2026, more than tripling in size over the year.

This growth was primarily driven by standardized and widely traded assets, with tokenized US Treasury Debt and commodities accounting for a substantial portion of the market. In contrast, categories typically associated with lower liquidity, such as tokenized real estate and private equity, remained smaller despite strong percentage growth. Tokenized real estate increased from about $35 million to $296 million, while private equity rose from nearly $60 million to $223 million.

Other segments, including asset-backed credit and corporate credit, also saw significant expansion, indicating rising issuance across a broader range of instruments. However, market value alone does not guarantee liquidity, as outstanding value can increase due to more assets being issued, even if secondary market trading remains limited.

data.title: Anthropic CEO to Meet with White House Chief of Staff on Friday
data.description: Anthropic's CEO is scheduled to meet with the White House Chief of Staff this Friday. According to Odaily, the meeting will take place at the White House. Further details about the agenda or topics of discussion have not been disclosed.
